creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Please, find an updated version at
	http://virtual-estates.net/libdjvu.shar

The license is, actually, remarkably relaxed. Even if we assume
the role of a licensee, we are still alowed to redistribute
(even charge for media or reasonable money if part of another
product). So, I'm puting the IS_INTERACTIVE there and ignore
the portlint's coercing about it :) NO_CDROM or NO_PACKAGE are
not needed, which is good :)

	-mi
